## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this change on my local machine
- [ ] No new warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] Existing tests pass (`python -m pytest`)
- [ ] Code follows the existing style (Python 3 stdlib only, no external dependencies)
- [ ] I have added tests for any new functionality

## Description

What does this change do and why?

## Related Issues

Link any issues this PR fixes (e.g. `Fixes #42`).
